description_long: This is a rectangular, vintage-style metal toolbox with a dark, weathered finish and reinforced corners. The box features prominent metal handles on both short sides, designed for easy carrying, and a central handle on the lid for lifting. The front face displays a robust latch mechanism with a keyhole, suggesting it can be securely locked. Subtle decorative elements and faint markings are visible on the surface, adding to its utilitarian, industrial character. The corners and edges are reinforced with additional metal brackets, enhancing durability. The overall appearance suggests it is built to withstand heavy use in urban or workshop environments.
description: A rugged, rectangular metal toolbox with reinforced corners, side handles, and a central locking latch. Its weathered finish and sturdy construction evoke a vintage, industrial style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main latch with keyhole, decorative surface markings, and reinforced corners.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting a large, fixed metal handle and the box's depth.
description_view_2: Rear view with plain surface, visible hinges, and reinforced corners.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with another fixed handle and faint yellow text or markings.
attribute_handle_type: Fixed, U-shaped metal handles on both short sides and a central fixed metal handle on the lid; all are robust and designed for carrying heavy loads.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Central front clasp latch made of metal, featuring a keyhole for locking; reinforced with metal brackets.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single large internal compartment implied by the box shape; no visible trays, drawers, or dividers on the exterior.
attribute_external_labeling: Faint yellow text on one short side, partially readable as 'BETTER GRADE' and some non-Latin script.
